/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libopenamp_dart_ffi.so -o /home/synth/projects/open-synth/native/libopenamp_dart_ffi.so CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/envelope.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/oscillator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/voice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/voice_allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/lfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/arpeggiator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/synth_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/synth_preset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/synth_ffi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/audio_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/audio_stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openamp_dart_ffi.dir/src/audio_stream_ffi.cpp.o  -lportaudio -lasound -lm -lpthread
